ai_table.description: Multi-channel routing by priority: failover automatically to the next provider

messages.enabled_row_required: Every column is required for enabled channels

groups.domestic_card_payment_description: Configure domestic card-code payment, payment links, and code management
groups.stripe_description: Customize your Stripe settings
groups.creem_description: Customize your Creem settings

select_payment_enabled.title: Enable Payment Method Selection
select_payment_enabled.tip: Allow users to choose a payment method; when disabled, the default payment provider will be used directly

default_payment_provider.title: Default Payment Provider
default_payment_provider.tip: Choose the payment provider used by default

domestic_card_payment_enabled.title: Enable Card-Code Payment
domestic_card_payment_enabled.tip: When enabled, the /pricing page uses non-auto-renew wording

stripe_signing_secret.title: Stripe Signing Secret
stripe_signing_secret.tip: Stripe Signing Secret is used to verify webhook notifications from Stripe

stripe_payment_methods.title: Stripe Payment Methods
stripe_payment_methods.tip: If not set, only card payments will be enabled

stripe_promotion_codes.title: Stripe Promotion Codes
stripe_promotion_codes.tip: Map the product_id in the pricing table to a Stripe promotion_code. Must be a valid JSON object.

stripe_allow_promotion_codes.title: Allow Stripe Promotion Codes
stripe_allow_promotion_codes.tip: Allow users to enter a custom promotion code; works only when no preset promotion code is provided

creem_signing_secret.title: Creem Signing Secret
creem_signing_secret.tip: Creem Signing Secret is used to verify webhook notifications from Creem

creem_product_ids.title: Creem Product IDs Mapping
creem_product_ids.tip: Map the product_id in the pricing table to the payment_product_id created in Creem. Must be a valid JSON object.

paypal_webhook_id.title: Paypal Webhook ID
paypal_webhook_id.tip: PayPal Webhook ID is used to verify webhook notifications from PayPal. You can find it in PayPal Developer Dashboard > Webhooks.

messages.domestic_card_links_required: Credits package, monthly, and yearly payment links are required when card-code payment is enabled

kami.title: Code Management
kami.description: Import and review card codes for the current payment-link product
kami.import_description: Import codes in bulk with line breaks, commas, or semicolons
kami.import_placeholder: One code per line, or separated by commas/semicolons

errors.code_invalid: Code not found. Please check and try again
errors.code_used: This code has already been used
errors.redeem_failed: Redeem failed, please try again later
errors.not_enabled: Domestic card-code payment is not enabled
errors.payment_link_missing: Payment link is not configured for this product
errors.payment_currency_missing: CNY price is not configured for this product
errors.table_not_ready: The card-code table is not ready yet. Run database migrations first
